subsections.text: “Mobile carrying device” means an electrically powered wheeled device that:
Is designed to operate semi-autonomously not more than 25 feet from its operator;
Is equipped with technology that allows for active monitoring of the operation of the device by the operator;
Is intended primarily to transport personal property on sidewalks and crosswalks;
Weighs less than 90 pounds when empty; and
Has a maximum speed of 12.5 miles per hour.
